title: Ashen + Ribbits Compat
description: A compatibility resource pack between Ashen 16x and Ribbits
body:
Want to play [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/project/LSmohupN) with [Ribbits](https://modrinth.com/project/8YcE8y4T)? Tired of certain blocks and items using vanilla textures and looking out of place with Ashen? Then this add-on is for you!

Place this pack _above_ Ashen in your load order.

<details>
<summary>Included textures:</summary>

- Mossy oak planks, stairs, slabs, etc.
- Mossy oak door (now in 3D!)
- Brown toadstool blocks

</details>



<hr/>

**Credits to:**
- [Aim_Boot](https://modrinth.com/user/vglxcci2) for the amazing [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/project/LSmohupN) resource pack
- [Joo5h](https://modrinth.com/user/d2FJGPoP) & Co. of [Bonsai Studios](https://discord.com/invite/sGwxnFV) for the adorable [Ribbits](https://modrinth.com/project/VzAGdu9D) mod

<hr/>

❗For any issues, questions, or suggestions regarding this add-on, please contact me through my email bunofthesun@gmail.com or drop me a message on the official [Ashen Discord](https://discord.gg/k5pDjKbhdh) @carrotsandsoup.
